title: voiage: Value of Information Analysis

authors.name: Dylan A. Mordaunt
authors.affiliation: Faculty of Health, Education and Psychology, Victoria University of Wellington; College of Medicine and Public Health, Flinders University; Centre for Health Policy, The University of Melbourne

abstract: Parameter-focused Value of Information analysis does not by itself represent uncertainty about model structure, population heterogeneity, analytical perspective, implementation, evidence quality, or the timing and reversibility of action. voiage implements shared data and result structures for classical VOI estimands and maturity-labelled extensions for these wider decision problems. The framework records strategy, sample, subgroup, perspective, population, diagnostic, and provenance semantics while distinguishing implemented contracts from empirical validation.
comments: Draft for author review. Page and figure counts require confirmation after final typesetting.
